what: Full batched sweep with the COMPLETE drafting stack (hybrid n-gram->EAGLE per stream, PR #72): B x AI-use-case x drafting-arm on a live 6x5090 EU ring. Sets g_batched from measurement (replaces the counting-prompt floor) and quantifies the batched throughput levers.
ring: 6 stages HU(head,[0:2]) HU[2:14] IT[14:26] DE[26:38] DK[38:50] HR[50:62], measured-footprint plan (12L/box cap), M25_EAGLE=1 M25_BATCH=8 kv 8192, graph-aux on (solo path), batched decode EAGER (no graph on run_block_decode_b yet), K=8, max_new 96, receipts ON

results.note: depth-4 pipelined; the equal-transport A/B baseline

headlines.eagle_g_transfers_to_batch: mixed-content g = 3.6 at B=4 (solo EAGLE band is 3.3-4.5). The A/B at equal transport: n-gram g=0.22 vs hybrid g=3.62 — a 16x drafting-quality lift; aggregate 4.62 -> 7.41 (1.6x).
headlines.g_by_use_case: summarize 5.8 (verbatim-quote content: n-gram+EAGLE stack) > tools-JSON 3.7 ~ reasoning 3.7 > code 2.9 > qa 2.4 > prose 2.2. The real-workload band is 2.2-5.8, mix ~3.6.
headlines.the_cost_that_caps_it: hybrid rounds run ~1.6-2.3s vs the ring's 220ms (the ngram arm at equal transport): the coordinator drafts B EAGLE chains SERIALLY (~250-360ms/stream on the shared head GPU) and EAGLE pins the in-flight window to 1. Batching amortizes the ring but re-pays the drafter: B-scaling 2.96 -> 9.72 (3.3x at B=8, not 8x).
headlines.receipts: 72/72 per-stage signatures VALID across all 12 batched jobs (the PR #72 attestation fix live-proven); coherent output on every sampled stream.

next_levers_quantified: 1. BATCH the B drafter chains into one [B,...] forward (same weights, per-stream KV — embarrassingly batchable): removes the ~250ms x B serial term; projected mixed B=8 agg ~3x today's.
2. CUDA-graph the drafter chain steps (8 serial launch-bound micro-steps/stream today).
3. Graph-capture run_block_decode_b (batched stages run eager; the ngram arm's 220ms round shows ring+eager floor).
4. Investigate depth>1 with stale-context EAGLE (quality-vs-pipelining tradeoff; today mirrors solo's depth-1 rule).
spec_impact: g_batched(content, hybrid) = 3.6 measured (band 2.2-5.8). OPERATIVE admission number set to 2.5: the measured content g discounted for the current drafter-serialization tax; revise up as levers 1-3 land. The 20-agg bar on THIS engine build is drafting-bound, not WAN-bound — an engine-lever problem, not an admission-physics one.
